commands.purpose: Print tenant stats: registered Geofenceable aliases + counts of models with fences drawn, active enforcement toggles, recent evaluations (last 24h), pending override tasks, health probe status.
Run one evaluation through GeofenceService for smoke testing. --dry-run calls healthCheck() instead of evaluate() (no persistence).
Print every registered #[Geofenceable] alias with its target class. Useful for debugging cross-module wiring.
Print every registered #[GeofenceSubjectAlias] with its target class.
Manually run ReconcileGeofenceCheckImmutabilityJob. Reports any check with > 1 audit event (evidence of attempted mutation).
